name: hplc_qc
description: Run HPLC purity QC on a synthesized batch using the lab's Agilent 1290 Infinity II. Call AFTER liquid_handler produced a batch_id. If passed_qc is true, the natural next tool is plate_reader for the binding assay. If passed_qc is false (purity <95%), branch to nmr_qc to confirm structural identity before running the assay — a contaminant could give a misleading readout.

batch_id.description: Batch ID returned by liquid_handler (format: LH-XXXXXXXX).
